description: CompositionBlue and beige kurta with white vertical floral print, made of 100% cotton, sleeveless with round neck that has a frill and lace detailing, buttoned chest placket, and has a panelled hem with lace detailing and side splitsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this grey printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this stylish neck, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
